category_sources: source_facts.description says advanced filtering web proxy; official Privoxy homepage describes a non-caching web proxy with filtering capabilities.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is privoxy; official homepage title and project name are Privoxy.
docs_sources: Official Privoxy site has dedicated user and developer manuals.
repo_sources: Official Privoxy developer manual says contributors can clone https://www.privoxy.org/git/privoxy.git; official gitweb describes it as the official Privoxy git repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states filtering web proxy; official homepage describes privacy enhancement, HTTP header modification, access control, and ad removal.
